title: Kernel bootstrap lane subagent1 retry. Find the exact Xauto scheduling workflow in this repo. Read only the minimum needed. Report authoritative files, commands, and any required inputs for scheduling a post today at 17:00. No edits.
summary_text: `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public` currently has no local GitHub/workflow or shell command that directly schedules `x-auto` posts. The authoritative in-repo routing is: 1. Posting invariants and source-of-truth: - [docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md) - Notion is the hub (`Body`, `Body JA`, `Source URLs`, `Image`, `Status`, `Tweet ID`) - Default mode is `draft` unless scheduling/publishing is explicit - [skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md) - Defines preflight for scheduling/publication and mandatory mode confirmation - [skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md) - Companion, does not define scheduling semantics 2. What is actually checked locally as “workflow health” for x-auto: - [scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py) - Expects queue items to use fields (`status`, `scheduled_for`) and treats datetime with a space (e.g., `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`) as required for scheduler to see time - Date-only `scheduled_for` is explicitly flagged as skip-prone - Looks for post queue at `~/Documents/x-auto/post_queue.json` - [scripts/eval/x-auto-health.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.sh) - Wrapper to run the same health check - [docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md) - Shows practical validation output; explicitly states “missing scheduled_for” as blocker and recommends assigning `scheduled_for` after row-level review 3. The in-repo command set for this scheduling task: - `bash scripts/eval/x-auto-health.sh` - Sanity-check required fields and scheduler readiness - `python3 scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py` (equivalent wrapper behavior) - `launchctl list` / `launchctl list | rg x-auto-scheduler` and queue checks via `~/Documents/x-auto/post_queue.json` for external runtime presence (the actual scheduler binary/launcher path is defined as `~/.local/bin/x-auto-scheduler.sh` and launchd plist in [scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py)) 4. Required inputs to schedule today at 17:00: - Notion row state: `Status = approved` - Timezone-consistent `scheduled_for` value for today at 17:00, e.g. `2026-04-04 17:00` (or with seconds if your local runtime expects/uses that) - Row remains unsent (`posted`/equivalent not set/false) - For scheduler safety, ensure image/text readiness is valid (`image_path` should be present for approved posts in the readiness checks) - Keep quote-post policy: no `x.com/` or `twitter.com/` URL in body unless using quote/reply flow with `Source URLs` populated If you want, I can give you a strict one-shot checklist you can execute against a specific Notion row ID using your current local x-auto runtime credentials.
